title: psychotria goetzei
intro: Psychotria goetzei, also known as the East African wild yam, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant is native to the tropical regions of East Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria goetzei include its ability to alleviate pain, reduce fever, and treat various infections, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Psychotria goetzei include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
